name: rubric rule schema validator rejects a rule with severity outside the P0 P1 P2 enum set
command: printf '{"id":"r","name":"r","description":"x","detector":"x","severity":"P9","version":"1.0.0"}\n' > rule.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-rule-schema.sh" --rule rule.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_severity=P9' err.txt && grep -q 'allowed=P0|P1|P2' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
